# K.R. Mangalam University (KRMU)

> K.R. Mangalam University (KRMU) is a UGC-recognized private university located in Gurugram, Haryana, India, established under the K.R. Mangalam University Act, 2013. It offers 100+ undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes across 12 schools: Engineering & Technology, Management & Commerce, Legal Studies, Liberal Arts, Basic & Applied Sciences, Architecture & Design, Journalism & Mass Communication, Physiotherapy & Rehabilitation, Medical & Allied Sciences, Agricultural Sciences, and Education. The university emphasizes industry-integrated learning, international collaborations, and research-driven education. It has partnerships with global institutions including George Mason University (USA) and offers specialized programmes in emerging areas such as AI & ML, Cyber Security, FinTech, Robotics, Semiconductor Design, and Full Stack Development. KRMU features a fully residential campus with hostels, sports facilities, a central library, research centres, and an active placement cell with 500+ recruiting companies.
